# Computational Notes

## Current Computational Scope

This bootstrap phase is analytic and literature-driven. No numerical simulation is required yet.

## Planned Structured Tasks

- Build a paper-by-paper matrix of observables, entanglement assumptions, and singularity claims.
- Normalize notation for boundary time, FRW proper time, and entanglement language.
- Extract one candidate criterion that can later be turned into a derivation or toy-model computation.

## Likely Follow-Up Computations

- Translate the large-subsystem entanglement probe of arXiv:1810.10601 into the closed-universe language of arXiv:2507.10649.
- Compare whether braneworld cosmologies and final-state projection give the same practical access to crunch data.
- Identify a coarse-grained observable that changes when bulk entanglement is dialed to zero.
